{{Quote|Soon after arriving in the Krant system, strange signals were received from the supposedly abandoned moon of Aereen. Echuu discovered an illegal Trade Federation mining operation on Aereen. General Tann had decided to secretly use the colony to supply the new Confederacy Decimator facilities on Krant with a constant source of raw materials. |[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
'''Aereen''' was a dusty, [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]]-rich [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Krant]] where a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] mining colony run by [[Plure Barron]] was [[Battle of Aereen|destroyed]] by [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After destroying the mining operation, Echuu moved on to [[Battle of Krant|invade]] Krant with the few soldiers he had left. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] was building [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimators]] here during the war.<ref name="GB:CC" />

{{Moon-stub}}
